query:
-- Check blitzImportDate and blitzReportName distribution for Telstra services
SELECT blitzImportDate, blitzReportName, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra'
GROUP BY blitzImportDate, blitzReportName
ORDER BY blitzImportDate DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- Sample 10 active Telstra services to understand structure
SELECT externalId, avcId, phoneNumber, planName, status, customerName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, 
       blitzImportDate, blitzReportName, blitzAccountNumber, blitzBillFeb26, blitzBillJan26, blitzBillMar26
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND status = 'active'
LIMIT 10;
